prompt: Redesign with watercolor brush strokes and pastel colors, giving a soft, artistic touch to each section.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a hand-drawn mind map. Redesign all visual elements—the central 'MIND MAPPING' node, main branches, sub-branches, text, and icons—using watercolor brush strokes. Apply a pastel color palette to these elements to create a soft, artistic aesthetic for the entire information graphic.
